case_title: LA TANNET MARIE WILSON VS. VICTOR D SATTERWHITE

docket_entries.description: APPL & DECLARATION FOR ORDER PROHIBITING DOMESTIC VIOLENCE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE-DOMESTIC VIOLENCE, CALENDAR MOTION: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR MOTION: TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER HEARING SET FOR OCT-02-2001 AT 01:00 PM IN DEPT 404
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE- OSC & TRO; DECL UCCJEA
STIPULATION THAT COMMISSIONER SLABACH MAY ACT AS JUDGE PRO TEMPORE
(404/MAS) PET IN PRO PER. RESP NOT PRESENT. PET SENT TO FCS FOR ORIENTATION. STIP FOR PRO TEM SIGNED. PET SWORN AND TESTIFIED. COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO GRANT AND ORDER
3YR STANDARD CONDUCT RO WITH 100 YARD STAY AWAY AGAINST RESP FOR PET, HER RESIDENCE, AND HER PLACE OF WORK. FIREARM RESTRICTION/RELINQUISHMENT
OF MINOR CHILD. RESP AND CHILD SHALL WORK OUT C/V BETWEEN THEMSELVES. COURT SIGNS ORDER. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY NORMA REAY #1520

PROOF OF SERVICE OF RESTRAINING ORDER AFTER HEARING FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED WILSON, LA TANNET MARIE (PP) SERVED OCT-10-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED SATTERWHITE, VICTOR D
